description: Establish a unified Documentation Center ('documentation/') with dual-track paths (Human/AI) and refactor README.md into a minimalist entry point.
scope: Create 'documentation/HUMAN_GUIDES/', 'documentation/AI_GUIDES/', and 'documentation/SAMPLES/' directories. Generate new markdown files (QUICKSTART, ARCHITECTURE, GOVERNANCE, FAQ_TROUBLESHOOTING, SYSTEM_PROMPT, MCP_API_REFERENCE, SCHEMA_REFERENCE) by extracting and restructuring existing content. Update README.md to act strictly as a navigator. Create 'documentation/SAMPLES/INDEX.md' to catalog existing V0.5 execution artifacts as examples. Include explicit deprecation/migration mappings in the new docs referencing the old 'docs/' and 'protocol/' files.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO deletion or relocation of existing 'docs/' or 'protocol/' files (deferred to M6). NO modification of MCP server logic, runtime execution environments, workflow state files, or execution artifacts. NO implementation of bootstrap scripts.
stop_conditions: Attempting to delete or move existing files in 'docs/' or 'protocol/'.
Attempting to modify any file outside allowed_files.
Executing without an approved M3 execution contract.
